generated_oml:
instance EngineTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring engine temperature in the automotive system"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EngineTemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance WheelSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring rotational speed of wheels"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WheelSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance ChassisVibrationSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor detecting vibrations in the vehicle chassis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData ChassisVibrationDataTransmitted
]

instance EngineTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EngineTemperatureSensor
]

instance WheelSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom WheelSpeedSensor
]

instance ChassisVibrationDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ChassisVibrationSensor
]

instance EngineTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data from engine sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EngineTemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm, StateEstimator
]

instance WheelSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time rotational speed data from wheels"
    DTDFVocab:fromData WheelSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEngine, StateEstimator
]

instance ChassisVibrationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time vibration data from chassis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ChassisVibrationDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEngine, FaultDetector
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Geometric model of the automotive system created using CAD"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CADTool, SimulationEngine
]

instance DifferentialEquationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical model describing dynamic behavior using differential equations"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEngine, CalibrationAlgorithm
]

instance CADTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Computer-Aided Design tool for structural modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveSimulationService
]

instance SimulationEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Differential equation-based simulation engine for dynamic behavior analysis"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveSimulationService
]

instance CalibrationAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithm for parameter estimation"
    DTDFVocab:enables StateEstimationService
]

instance FaultDetector : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithmic component for fault detection"
    DTDFVocab:enables FaultDetectionService
]

instance SupervisoryController : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Component for supervisory control of system operations"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance StateEstimator : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for state estimation to update parameters"
    DTDFVocab:enables StateEstimationService
]

instance Optimizer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for system performance optimization"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Monitors system safety and operational optimality using sensor data analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyViolationInsight, OperationalOptimalityInsight, ModifyPhysicalComponentAction
]

instance PredictiveSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulates physical behavior using calibrated physics-based models for predictive analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictedBehaviorInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Detects anomalies in system behavior using fault detection algorithms"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectedInsight
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Updates system parameters through state estimation algorithms"
    DTDFVocab:provides ParameterUpdateInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enhances system performance via optimization algorithms"
    DTDFVocab:provides PerformanceOptimizationInsight
]

instance SafetyViolationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Indicates safety violation detected in the system"
]

instance OperationalOptimalityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Indicates operational optimality status of the system"
]

instance PredictedBehaviorInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted future behavior of the physical twin based on simulation"
]

instance FaultDetectedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected fault in the system components"
]

instance ParameterUpdateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Updated parameters of the system state"
]

instance PerformanceOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized performance metrics for system operation"
]

instance ModifyPhysicalComponentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of physical components based on violation detection"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance Chassis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Structural component of the automotive system"
]

instance Wheels : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Rotating components of the automotive system"
]

instance Engine : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Powertrain component of the automotive system"
]

instance AutomotiveEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Dynamic environment in which the automotive system operates"
    base:contains Chassis, Wheels, Engine
]
